evals.prompt: I captured 47 execution plans from a production workload trace this morning. Give me a dashboard showing the top issues across the whole workload.
evals.expected_output: Aggregate dashboard with Per-Plan Summary table, Top Findings ranked, Consolidated Missing Indexes (cross-plan dedup), Memory Grant Summary, Cardinality Accuracy Report. References /sqlplan-review and /sqlindex-advisor as drill-down paths.

evals.prompt: 100 plans from QA. Which 5 should I tune first?
evals.expected_output: Top 5 plans ranked by aggregate impact (severity x frequency x estimated effort). Each entry links back to specific .sqlplan file and the dominant finding driving its ranking.
